name: io.github.codespar/mcp-chargebee
description: MCP server for Chargebee — global subscription billing, recurring revenue orchestration

environmentVariables.name: CHARGEBEE_SITE
environmentVariables.description: Chargebee site subdomain (e.g. 'acme' for acme.chargebee.com, 'acme-test' for test site)

environmentVariables.name: CHARGEBEE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Chargebee API key (full-access or restricted) from Settings > API Keys
